name: premium
description: Fine dining presentation of Malaysian plant-based cuisine, with minimal elegant plating on dark wood surfaces. This mood elevates traditional flavors to a refined, aspirational level — proving plant-based Malaysian food belongs at the finest table.

style.lighting: dramatic side light | subtle rim lighting | dark moody with warm accents
style.color_grade: deep earth tones | dark wood warmth | gold accent highlights
style.camera: macro food detail | slow cinematic pan | overhead minimal plating
style.composition: negative space emphasis | single hero dish centered | elegant garnish details
style.props: dark wood board, matte black ceramic, gold utensils, single herb garnish, linen napkin
style.atmosphere: elegant, refined, aspirational, sophisticated, quiet luxury

copy_tone: Refined and measured, with carefully chosen words. Evokes exclusivity without being pretentious. Descriptors feel curated — heritage rendang, artisan paste, crafted with intention.
example_prompt_fragment: An elegant fine-dining presentation of plant-based rendang on a dark matte ceramic plate, dark polished wood table, dramatic side lighting with warm rim light, single microgreen garnish, negative space composition, shallow depth of field on sauce texture, premium food photography, sophisticated earth tones
